PAGES.HOME_SUBTITLE: Caring for your health is our top priority. Modern equipment and experienced doctors.
PAGES.ABOUT_SUBTITLE: We work for your health using advanced European-level medical technologies.
PAGES.SERVICES_SUBTITLE: A wide range of diagnostics, treatment, and disease prevention for the whole family.
PAGES.DOCTORS_SUBTITLE: A team of professionals and experts with many years of practical experience.
PAGES.CONTACTS_SUBTITLE: Make an appointment or ask us any question. We are always here to help.

SERVICES.SECTION_TITLE: Medical Services for the Whole Family
SERVICES.CAT1_DESC: Services fully covered by the National Health Service of Ukraine (NHSU).
SERVICES.CAT1_ITEM5: Electronic sick leaves and referrals (to specialists or for advanced diagnostics)
SERVICES.CAT2_DESC: Comprehensive evaluation of the heart and cardiovascular system.
SERVICES.CAT3_DESC: Effective pain management of various origins and treatment of trophic ulcers.
SERVICES.CAT4_DESC: Treatment of organ prolapse, spasms, and post-illness lung rehabilitation.
SERVICES.CAT4_ITEM1: Visceral massage of internal organs (prolapse treatment, spasm relief)
SERVICES.CAT4_ITEM2: Elimination of adhesions, reduction of keloid scars, and treatment of fibrotic changes in lungs
SERVICES.CAT5_DESC: Correction of cosmetic skin defects and facial rejuvenation.
SERVICES.CAT5_ITEM2: Acne scar removal, pigmentation lightening, and freckle removal
SERVICES.CAT5_ITEM3: Facial skin lifting and wrinkle reduction (including expression lines)

MODAL.TITLE: Book an Appointment
MODAL.SUBTITLE: Leave your contact details, and our coordinator will get in touch with you shortly.
MODAL.SUCCESS_TEXT: Your request has been successfully submitted. We will call you within 15 minutes.
